description_long: This is a medium-to-large, muscular dog with a short, smooth, pale yellow coat and a broad, expressive face. The dog has a strong, straight back, a deep chest, and a well-proportioned body typical of retriever breeds. Its ears are floppy and hang close to the sides of its head, while the tail is straight and tapers to a point, held in a relaxed, slightly downward position. The legs are sturdy and well-muscled, with the paws firmly planted, suggesting an alert but calm demeanor. The eyes are dark and the nose is black, providing contrast to the light fur. There is no visible collar or leash, and the dog appears healthy and well-groomed.
description: A muscular, pale yellow dog with a short coat, floppy ears, and a straight, relaxed tail. The dog has a broad face, sturdy build, and no visible collar or leash.
description_view_0: Side view showing the dog's strong build, straight back, and relaxed tail; left profile with floppy ear visible.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the broad face, dark eyes, and both floppy ears; chest and front legs are prominent.
description_view_2: Opposite side view showing the right profile, relaxed tail, and muscular body; similar to view 0 but mirrored.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the dog's back, hind legs, and straight tail; both floppy ears are visible from behind.
